extra.reason: Closed
docs/authored-geometry.md written and cross-linked from assets.md

render/assets/ loader + AssetLibrary + SceneDefinition.assets landed; full ci green. LoadingTracker progress hook exposed (onProgress) but wired to the app tracker in the integrate bead, since no scene loads a model until then.

ClockSceneView wired to AssetLibrary with generator fallback; ClockRenderer owns a shared AssetRegistry and treats assetsBusy like materialsBusy. Full ci green (671 unit tests incl. 4 new authored-geometry cases). Existing procedural scenes byte-identical (no assets -> generator path untouched); e2e/screenshot verification is bead .11.
ring-body drum modelled to spec (r1.0/t0.42/bore0.62, axis Blender X, 768 tris, closed shell), exported to babbage-drum.glb, screenshot saved

numerals modelled at digitAngle (10 digits, 988 tris, cap 0.38 m matching engine layout), verified upright at reading line for d=0/3/7 via -d*36 deg about Blender X, exported to babbage-numerals.glb. Contract-doc sign bug found and filed as t84.12
gearA-D + arbor + gear-pin modelled to the dimension table, correct axes, all under budget, booleaned webs clean, exported to babbage-gears.glb, screenshot saved
balance/escape-wheel/cock/detent modelled to engine frames, correct pivots+axes (detent hangs Blender -Z), 1402 tris total, exported to babbage-escapement.glb, screenshots saved
case-shell/bezel/lid/hinge/shackle/stud modelled, correct orientation (mouth -Y, hinge -X, shackle +Z), single stud for instancing, 2056 tris, node names verified, exported to babbage-case.glb

table (6x4 slab+legs) + env-backwall modelled, ground-down, origins at world 0 for identity placement, clock proxy verified seated; table-top height documented (three Y = -1.96) for t84.10. Exported to babbage-set.glb

Fixed docs/authored-geometry.md §4: corrected numeral y_axis to (0,ct,st) (engine-derived, right-handed, digit 0 upright), added numeralLayout cap-height guidance (~0.39 m), and added §2 note that the detent-lever hangs along Blender -Z (three -Y), not Blender -Y

babbage-engine.glb assembled (19 roles, 585KB, Draco off/documented), babbage-engine scene registered, buildStaticSet places the table; case+escapement re-sized to real measureCase clearance, bosses instanced to fit <40 draw calls; ci green, renders correctly

babbage-engine verified: unit budget(<150k/<40)+conservation tests pass, 77/77 e2e green in Docker, new babbage-engine.png baseline generated & inspected, procedural baselines unchanged, animation+leak-free confirmed; full ci green

Authored clock geometry delivered: all parts modelled in Blender, assembled into public/assets/models/babbage-engine.glb, driven by the existing mechanism via the babbage-engine scene. Loader+wiring (t84.1-3), all six model beads (t84.4-9), assembly+scene+set placement (t84.10), verification with baseline (t84.11), and contract doc fix (t84.12) all complete. Full ci green; 77/77 e2e green.

Ornate rectangular steampunk casing replaces the round case in babbage-engine; new distinct 'casing' slot + housingStyle:'none' opt-out + buildCasing(); smooth-shaded, encloses the mechanism. ci green, e2e baseline regenerated. Shipped in PR #43

Won't do: procedural scene/geometry path abandoned in favour of ?scene=babbage-engine authored (Blender) geometry, now the default. qxj targets the procedural copper-padlock-clock scene; q51 refines the procedural numeral generator; 1ji/j4i/m33/r0q/gkn harden procedural geometry code (extrude/uv/creased-normals) that now only runs as the degrade-to-procedural fallback.
